items.name: Immortal Karambit: Azurewraths Descent
items.description:
The Karambit, Azurewraths Descent is a stunningly crafted blade that merges celestial beauty with lethal precision. Featuring a curved, razor-sharp edge adorned with shimmering azure patterns resembling angelic wings, it evokes a sense of divine fury. The handle, wrapped in dark obsidian tones with silver accents, offers both elegance and unmatched grip. Perfect for collectors and combat enthusiasts alike, this karambit symbolizes the balance between grace and wrath, embodying its wielder's power and finesse.

Use 3D to see how it looks without glare
Karambit series

items.name: Glacier Wings Of Frost
items.description: The 1 STOCK - Glacier Wings Of Frost is an elegant and icy accessory designed for players who want to add a touch of frost to their avatar. These wings feature a stunning, crystalline design with a frosty blue and white color scheme, giving off an ethereal, cold glow. Perfect for creating a wintry look or showcasing a cool, majestic appearance, these wings make your avatar stand out with their shimmering, frost-covered texture. Whether you’re flying through a snowy landscape or just want to add a bit of chill to your style, these wings are sure to make a striking impression.

items.name: Golden Gilded Celestial Wings
items.description: Golden Gilded Celestial Wings evoke an image of ethereal beauty and divine majesty. These wings are resplendent with a shimmering golden hue, each feather bathed in the warm glow of celestial light. Adorned with delicate gilding, they possess an otherworldly elegance that captivates all who behold them. They emanate an aura of purity and grace, symbolizing the celestial realms from which they originate. These wings are not just a means of flight; they are a manifestation of celestial power and transcendent beauty, embodying the essence of the divine.
